videos.headline: Rogers answers with the big play for New Mexico State
videos.description: Tyler Rogers hits Gregory Hogan for a 59-yard touchdown pass to reclaim the lead for the Aggies.

videos.headline: New Mexico State scores on opening drive
videos.description: Tyler Rodgers scores a 5-yard touchdown run to give the Aggies the lead.

videos.headline: Georgia Southern answers with tying TD
videos.description: L.A. Ramsby scores a 1-yard touchdown to tie the game.

videos.headline: Eagles score on the lead option to tie game
videos.description: Wesley Fields races 48-yards for a Georgia Southern touchdown to tie the game.

videos.headline: New Mexico explodes into Georgia Sourthern territory
videos.description: Tyler Rogers hits Jason Huntley for a 39-yard pass play to get the Aggies into Eagles territory.

videos.headline: Georgia Southern's Murray ejected for hit
videos.description: R.J. Murray is ejected for targeting for hitting Jason Huntley on the head.

videos.headline: Rogers connects with Scott to give  Aggies  the lead
videos.description: Tyler Rogers hits Jaleel Scott for a 5-yard touchdown to reclaim the lead for New Mexico State.

videos.headline: Carter answers for Southern
videos.description: Dexter Carter Jr.'s 70 kickoff return for a touchdown  puts the Eagles back on top.

videos.headline: New Mexico gets creative for a TD
videos.description: Conner Cramer to Bryce Roberts on the double pass for a 17-yard touchdown to give the Aggies the lead in the 4th quarter.

videos.headline: Brinson's INT halts the Aggies drive
videos.description: Monquavion Brinson's second interception of the game in sets up the Eagles in New Mexico State territory.

videos.headline: Rogers to Muse for a huge conversion
videos.description: Tyler Rogers and Anthony Muse connect for 20-yards for an Aggies first down on 3rd and 13 to keep the drive alive.

videos.headline: Stewart and Jackson with the final analysis of New Mexico State's victory over Georgia Southern
videos.description: Matt Stewart and Tyoka Jackson breakdown QB Tyler Rogers's 4 total touchdown performance for New Mexico State.
